title: Air China Cargo Increases Chengdu Service to Daily Flights from Glasgow Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Air China Cargo has increased its service between Glasgow Prestwick Airport and Chengdu, now operating daily flights. This announcement marks a significant enhancement in the airline's cargo operations, reflecting growing trade demands.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: The increase in service frequency is expected to improve logistical operations for businesses relying on cargo transport between Scotland and China. Enhanced connectivity can facilitate trade opportunities, potentially benefiting various sectors, including exports and imports.
